center.name: 塔劳群岛县
center.summary: 塔劳群岛县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Great-billed parrot、Blue-naped parrot、紅藍吸蜜鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: talautensis, is native to the Visayas and Mindanao island groups of the Philippines, with a range extending to the Talaud Islands of Indonesia. T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The great-billed parrot is found in forest, woodland and mangrove in the south-east Asian islands of Maluku, Raja Ampat, Talaud, Sangir, Sarangani, the Lesser Sundas, and nearby small islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a single island, Karakelong, in the Indonesian archipelago, although it was formerly found on the Sangihe Islands and other parts of the Talaud Islands
